name: chain_ph_launch_octoclaw_hire_ai_specialist
method: [PH LAUNCH] OctoClaw: Hire AI specialists for marketing, sales, support, and more

stages.task: Scrape PH front page + /launches/today for AI/SaaS tools. Extract: company name, website, founder Twitter/LinkedIn, upvote count, tagline. Filter for tools targeting marketing/sales/support (OctoClaw category).
Score each launch: upvotes >50 = warm, >200 = hot. Check if founder email findable via Hunter.io free tier or apollo free credits. Discard no-contact leads.

Generate personalized cold email referencing their PH launch day. Angle: we build AI agent systems that complement their stack. Route into existing cold_outbound pipeline (chain_cold_outbound). Send within 48h of launch.
